TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Law-ce, title = Law-ce, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Law-ce} }

S.FORM: == Law-ce老子 == nikaudipan生平 caay ka tinengi ku niyadu'故里之辯 caay ka tineng ku pilecuhan ni Law-ce, i cudad inai' ku katinengan nu pilecuhan ni Law-ce, uydasa ni Se-ma-cin a ni sulitan, Cu u sumamaday a Cu-kuo, Ku-sin aydaay nu Lu-yi-sin, Li-niyadu' u Sin-cen-tun a Tay-cin-kun niyadu', Cei-ze-li aydaay nu Cin-cen-hu kitidaan - Tay-cin-kun-cen. 44 Law-ce" nu ayawan linpic cay mihcaan- nu ayawan sippic cay mihcaan", pilecuhan i Tun-cuo a Cu-kuo Ku-sin Li-sen-ceu-zei-li. cun-cen-ciw se-sing-cia, mueneng i Sye-tay-kun-yen-san. 老子前(571年—前471年), . palitaen ni Kun-ce 孔子問道 nikudan kainai' en tu nu Tun-cuo wan-se, tatengan idaw kina ci Cuo-tin-ce, cilaw ku yadahay nu niyadu'an, mangalay namin malatahudan, ci Li-pen-le-hay matulin tu tusa a lasubu nu pina a mihcaan. ci Cuo-sing-wan sabaw tu pitu mihcaan, sikawaw tu " ce-tay-ce-lun", bahbahan patayda i sawacan, hatidaay tu nu cudadan maalaw patayda i Cu-kuo a Kuo-du, ales han ci Law-ce. samuhmuh satu ci Law-ce, malalacal sa aci Kun-ce. . Law-ce老子 saan, tawya mala sakakaay ci Law-ce caay kalesem makaadih tu Cuo-caw mademec, tawya miculimek namakayda i Ku-kun a tahekal nu ayawan, tawya maadih tu sakakaay ci " Kung-lin", katayni palabang han, mangalay papisakamu ci Cuo-lian. Idawya ci Li-zan sakamusa, tuci Yi-si-taw, " idaw ku cudad ni Law-ce tu " taw-de-cin", malatusa, pabaay a cudad u "taw-de", tada i hekal ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu cancanan, palutatengan ku di'di'tusa, sasaay nu cudadan u " de-cin" sakay tademaw kuyda, hican taayaw tadikud a kamuan, kya matenens ku hican misuayaw tu tademaw sa. caay ka hedek ku nipinanaman, mangelu' minanam, sadikuday idaw ku laheci." uyni sat uku liwan, kacaw satu katalan mulaliw. 相傳, . tina kungkuan, ci Yi-si i pasayda i lala' sakamusa, maadih ku walian salungan ku demiad, takelal sa, mahicaay kiya ku demiad, tanunamuh sa, tabaki ku ngiha " namaka walian ku kapah nu demiad, idaw ku caayay kalecad nu tademaw makayda". katuud ku tademaw nai' ku lawad miasik, mihalhal tu nikatayni nu tademaw, i Ku-kun nu panapananan ni sulitan tu hudi saan " ce-ci-tun-lay" sepat kina tabakiay ni sulitan, katukuh ayda, sisa sumamad u " ce-ci-tun-lay-han-ku-kan, lima a malebut ku cud ani Law-ce". ". udip a nidatengan 個人思想 ci Law-ce u milingatuay misulit tu taw-cia a tademaw, sakaudip pakunida sananay, kasikadan ku kamu, hatedep han, acaay kacacinlaw atu taw. sakay cen-ce hamin han pasu adidiay nu tademawan a mikuwan, idaw ku cacayay nu kamu ni Law-ce, " matineng ku pabaway, anu idaw ku la'cusay hida hantu, anu mahica ku kamu nu taw, hidan tu sa.", anu mangalay ku binawlan, sayadahen ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapatay ku binawlan, miyukiw kita tu siidaay nu tademaw, caay ka patay ku binawla, uyca ka talawan mapatay sa." ." kapatayan去世 Law-ce hedek nu mihcaan itida i Di-taw-hu mapatay. nikapatayan ni Law-ce a siwmian. . mala bunsan ci Law-cean sa老子化胡說 idaw ku sananay caay henay ka patay ci Law-ce sa, katukuh i Si-yi, pasakamuen ku Si-yi a tademaw, uyni u kamusa " Law-ce-hua-hu". Law-ce-hua-hu inakamu namaka Tun-han, han-hen-ti-yen-si siwa mihcaan " caylimlim mihcaan" ida i cuda nu sing-cea " idaw ku sananay ci Law-cean tayda i Yi-di malabunsan" a sasakamuen. "的說法. daw-ciw atu tay-sang-law-cun道教和太上老君 daw-ciw taneng talaayaw taydan nu sumamad nu syakay Cuo-kuo tademaw a kawawan, nikudan haymawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, hun-law-daw nu dadatengan, sisa, ci Law-ce u daw-cu han nu tademaw. sa u daw-ciw nu disi saan, ci Law-ce u tay-cen nu di'tuan. An-hua-wo-yen a Law-ce nakamuan itida i Wo-yen dadaydaysa, u kamu sa ku dadaydayan, bangcal ku kamu, idaw ku talakaway a nikinkiwan nu'puc a cudadan, malatusa kina kawaw, sayaway namakawawa katukuh tu balaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakay ci Law-ce atu ten-cin-kun a nakamuan. ina Wo-yen ten-cin-kun tataydaan midang atu Kan-aw a binacadan mapulung mihedek a masanga. mahiniay a Law-ce anunamakapina tu nu malebut a mihcaan nu kakakunkuan atu nidaydayan nu kakungkuan, matineng ku paylumaluma' ay nu tademawan, malenec tu a mitengil. . Law-cun-yun ba'tu老君岩 itida i Ci-iun buyu idaw ku mahida u tademaw a tabakiay nu ba'tuan mahida nipituktukan a cun-ciw zitay midatengay nu lumaan ci Law-ce a sasing, pangangan han Law-cun-yun ba'tu. Law-cun-yun ba'tu patideng i Sung-yun a zitayan, u Cung-kuo ayda satabakiay a Sun-tay daw-ciw a ba'tu nu sasingan, u Cin-yun buyu tataydaan midang, bangcal ku nituktukan, malalikisi atu nalimaan a epucan.
S.PHON: == r~ɾaw-ʦə** == nikaudipan** ʦaaj ka tinəŋi ku nijaduʔ~ʡ**** ʦaaj ka tinəŋ ku pir~ɾəʦuħan ni r~ɾaw-ʦə, i ʦudad inaiʔ~ʡ ku katinəŋan nu pir~ɾəʦuħan ni r~ɾaw-ʦə, ujdasa ni sə-ma-ʦin a ni sur~ɾitan, ʦu u sumamadaj a ʦu-kuo, ku-sin ajdaaj nu r~ɾu-ji-sin, r~ɾi-nijaduʔ~ʡ u sin-ʦən-tun a taj-ʦin-kun nijaduʔ~ʡ, ʦəi-zə-r~ɾi ajdaaj nu ʦin-ʦən-ħu kitidaan - taj-ʦin-kun-ʦən. ** r~ɾaw-ʦə" nu ajawan r~ɾinpiʦ ʦaj miħʦaan- nu ajawan sippiʦ ʦaj miħʦaan", pir~ɾəʦuħan i tun-ʦuo a ʦu-kuo ku-sin r~ɾi-sən-ʦəu-zəi-r~ɾi. ʦun-ʦən-ʦiw sə-siŋ-ʦia, muənəŋ i sjə-taj-kun-jən-san. ***(**********), . par~ɾitaən ni kun-ʦə **** nikudan kainaiʔ~ʡ ən tu nu tun-ʦuo wan-sə, tatəŋan idaw kina ʦi ʦuo-tin-ʦə, ʦir~ɾaw ku jadaħaj nu nijaduʔ~ʡan, maŋar~ɾaj namin mar~ɾataħudan, ʦi r~ɾi-pən-r~ɾə-ħaj matur~ɾin tu tusa a r~ɾasubu nu pina a miħʦaan. ʦi ʦuo-siŋ-wan sabaw tu pitu miħʦaan, sikawaw tu " ʦə-taj-ʦə-r~ɾun", baħbaħan patajda i sawaʦan, ħatidaaj tu nu ʦudadan maar~ɾaw patajda i ʦu-kuo a kuo-du, ar~ɾəs ħan ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə. samuħmuħ satu ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə, mar~ɾar~ɾaʦar~ɾ sa aʦi kun-ʦə. . r~ɾaw-ʦə** saan, tawja mar~ɾa sakakaaj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə ʦaaj kar~ɾəsəm makaadiħ tu ʦuo-ʦaw madəməʦ, tawja miʦur~ɾimək namakajda i ku-kun a taħəkar~ɾ nu ajawan, tawja maadiħ tu sakakaaj ʦi " kuŋ-r~ɾin", katajni par~ɾabaŋ ħan, maŋar~ɾaj papisakamu ʦi ʦuo-r~ɾian. idawja ʦi r~ɾi-zan sakamusa, tuʦi ji-si-taw, " idaw ku ʦudad ni r~ɾaw-ʦə tu " taw-də-ʦin", mar~ɾatusa, pabaaj a ʦudad u "taw-də", tada i ħəkar~ɾ ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu ʦanʦanan, par~ɾutatəŋan ku diʔ~ʡdiʔ~ʡtusa, sasaaj nu ʦudadan u " də-ʦin" sakaj tadəmaw kujda, ħiʦan taajaw tadikud a kamuan, kja matənəns ku ħiʦan misuajaw tu tadəmaw sa. ʦaaj ka ħədək ku nipinanaman, maŋər~ɾuʔ~ʡ minanam, sadikudaj idaw ku r~ɾaħəʦi." ujni sat uku r~ɾiwan, kaʦaw satu katar~ɾan mur~ɾar~ɾiw. **, . tina kuŋkuan, ʦi ji-si i pasajda i r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ sakamusa, maadiħ ku war~ɾian sar~ɾuŋan ku dəmiad, takər~ɾar~ɾ sa, maħiʦaaj kija ku dəmiad, tanunamuħ sa, tabaki ku ŋiħa " namaka war~ɾian ku kapaħ nu dəmiad, idaw ku ʦaajaj kar~ɾəʦad nu tadəmaw makajda". katuud ku tadəmaw naiʔ~ʡ ku r~ɾawad miasik, miħar~ɾħar~ɾ tu nikatajni nu tadəmaw, i ku-kun nu panapananan ni sur~ɾitan tu ħudi saan " ʦə-ʦi-tun-r~ɾaj" səpat kina tabakiaj ni sur~ɾitan, katukuħ ajda, sisa sumamad u " ʦə-ʦi-tun-r~ɾaj-ħan-ku-kan, r~ɾima a mar~ɾəbut ku ʦud ani r~ɾaw-ʦə". ". udip a nidatəŋan **** ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə u mir~ɾiŋatuaj misur~ɾit tu taw-ʦia a tadəmaw, sakaudip pakunida sananaj, kasikadan ku kamu, ħatədəp ħan, aʦaaj kaʦaʦinr~ɾaw atu taw. sakaj ʦən-ʦə ħamin ħan pasu adidiaj nu tadəmawan a mikuwan, idaw ku ʦaʦajaj nu kamu ni r~ɾaw-ʦə, " matinəŋ ku pabawaj, anu idaw ku r~ɾaʔ~ʡʦusaj ħida ħantu, anu maħiʦa ku kamu nu taw, ħidan tu sa.", anu maŋar~ɾaj ku binawr~ɾan, sajadaħən ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapataj ku binawr~ɾan, mijukiw kita tu siidaaj nu tadəmaw, ʦaaj ka pataj ku binawr~ɾa, ujʦa ka tar~ɾawan mapataj sa." ." kapatajan** r~ɾaw-ʦə ħədək nu miħʦaan itida i di-taw-ħu mapataj. nikapatajan ni r~ɾaw-ʦə a siwmian. . mar~ɾa bunsan ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦəan sa***** idaw ku sananaj ʦaaj ħənaj ka pataj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə sa, katukuħ i si-ji, pasakamuən ku si-ji a tadəmaw, ujni u kamusa " r~ɾaw-ʦə-ħua-ħu". r~ɾaw-ʦə-ħua-ħu inakamu namaka tun-ħan, ħan-ħən-ti-jən-si siwa miħʦaan " ʦajr~ɾimr~ɾim miħʦaan" ida i ʦuda nu siŋ-ʦəa " idaw ku sananaj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦəan tajda i ji-di mar~ɾabunsan" a sasakamuən. "***. daw-ʦiw atu taj-saŋ-r~ɾaw-ʦun******* daw-ʦiw tanəŋ tar~ɾaajaw tajdan nu sumamad nu sjakaj ʦuo-kuo tadəmaw a kawawan, nikudan ħajmawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, ħun-r~ɾaw-daw nu dadatəŋan, sisa, ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə u daw-ʦu ħan nu tadəmaw. sa u daw-ʦiw nu disi saan, ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə u taj-ʦən nu diʔ~ʡtuan. an-ħua-wo-jən a r~ɾaw-ʦə nakamuan itida i wo-jən dadajdajsa, u kamu sa ku dadajdajan, baŋʦar~ɾ ku kamu, idaw ku tar~ɾakawaj a nikinkiwan nuʔ~ʡpuʦ a ʦudadan, mar~ɾatusa kina kawaw, sajawaj namakawawa katukuħ tu bar~ɾaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakaj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə atu tən-ʦin-kun a nakamuan. ina wo-jən tən-ʦin-kun tatajdaan midaŋ atu kan-aw a binaʦadan mapur~ɾuŋ miħədək a masaŋa. maħiniaj a r~ɾaw-ʦə anunamakapina tu nu mar~ɾəbut a miħʦaan nu kakakunkuan atu nidajdajan nu kakuŋkuan, matinəŋ ku pajr~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ aj nu tadəmawan, mar~ɾənəʦ tu a mitəŋir~ɾ. . r~ɾaw-ʦun-jun baʔ~ʡtu*** itida i ʦi-iun buju idaw ku maħida u tadəmaw a tabakiaj nu baʔ~ʡtuan maħida nipituktukan a ʦun-ʦiw zitaj midatəŋaj nu r~ɾumaan ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə a sasiŋ, paŋaŋan ħan r~ɾaw-ʦun-jun baʔ~ʡtu. r~ɾaw-ʦun-jun baʔ~ʡtu patidəŋ i suŋ-jun a zitajan, u ʦuŋ-kuo ajda satabakiaj a sun-taj daw-ʦiw a baʔ~ʡtu nu sasiŋan, u ʦin-jun buju tatajdaan midaŋ, baŋʦar~ɾ ku nituktukan, mar~ɾar~ɾikisi atu nar~ɾimaan a əpuʦan.
S.FORM: == Law-ce老子 == nikaudipan生平 caay ka tinengi ku niyadu'故里之辯 caay ka tineng ku pilecuhan ni Law-ce, i cudad inai' ku katinengan nu pilecuhan ni Law-ce, uydasa ni Se-ma-cin a ni sulitan, Cu u sumamaday a Cu-kuo, Ku-sin aydaay nu Lu-yi-sin, Li-niyadu' u Sin-cen-tun a Tay-cin-kun niyadu', Cei-ze-li aydaay nu Cin-cen-hu kitidaan - Tay-cin-kun-cen. 44 Law-ce" nu ayawan linpic cay mihcaan- nu ayawan sippic cay mihcaan", pilecuhan i Tun-cuo a Cu-kuo Ku-sin Li-sen-ceu-zei-li. cun-cen-ciw se-sing-cia, mueneng i Sye-tay-kun-yen-san. 老子前(571年—前471年), . palitaen ni Kun-ce 孔子問道 nikudan kainai' en tu nu Tun-cuo wan-se, tatengan idaw kina ci Cuo-tin-ce, cilaw ku yadahay nu niyadu'an, mangalay namin malatahudan, ci Li-pen-le-hay matulin tu tusa a lasubu nu pina a mihcaan. ci Cuo-sing-wan sabaw tu pitu mihcaan, sikawaw tu " ce-tay-ce-lun", bahbahan patayda i sawacan, hatidaay tu nu cudadan maalaw patayda i Cu-kuo a Kuo-du, ales han ci Law-ce. samuhmuh satu ci Law-ce, malalacal sa aci Kun-ce. . Law-ce老子 saan, tawya mala sakakaay ci Law-ce caay kalesem makaadih tu Cuo-caw mademec, tawya miculimek namakayda i Ku-kun a tahekal nu ayawan, tawya maadih tu sakakaay ci " Kung-lin", katayni palabang han, mangalay papisakamu ci Cuo-lian. Idawya ci Li-zan sakamusa, tuci Yi-si-taw, " idaw ku cudad ni Law-ce tu " taw-de-cin", malatusa, pabaay a cudad u "taw-de", tada i hekal ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu cancanan, palutatengan ku di'di'tusa, sasaay nu cudadan u " de-cin" sakay tademaw kuyda, hican taayaw tadikud a kamuan, kya matenens ku hican misuayaw tu tademaw sa. caay ka hedek ku nipinanaman, mangelu' minanam, sadikuday idaw ku laheci." uyni sat uku liwan, kacaw satu katalan mulaliw. 相傳, . tina kungkuan, ci Yi-si i pasayda i lala' sakamusa, maadih ku walian salungan ku demiad, takelal sa, mahicaay kiya ku demiad, tanunamuh sa, tabaki ku ngiha " namaka walian ku kapah nu demiad, idaw ku caayay kalecad nu tademaw makayda". katuud ku tademaw nai' ku lawad miasik, mihalhal tu nikatayni nu tademaw, i Ku-kun nu panapananan ni sulitan tu hudi saan " ce-ci-tun-lay" sepat kina tabakiay ni sulitan, katukuh ayda, sisa sumamad u " ce-ci-tun-lay-han-ku-kan, lima a malebut ku cud ani Law-ce". ". udip a nidatengan 個人思想 ci Law-ce u milingatuay misulit tu taw-cia a tademaw, sakaudip pakunida sananay, kasikadan ku kamu, hatedep han, acaay kacacinlaw atu taw. sakay cen-ce hamin han pasu adidiay nu tademawan a mikuwan, idaw ku cacayay nu kamu ni Law-ce, " matineng ku pabaway, anu idaw ku la'cusay hida hantu, anu mahica ku kamu nu taw, hidan tu sa.", anu mangalay ku binawlan, sayadahen ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapatay ku binawlan, miyukiw kita tu siidaay nu tademaw, caay ka patay ku binawla, uyca ka talawan mapatay sa." ." kapatayan去世 Law-ce hedek nu mihcaan itida i Di-taw-hu mapatay. nikapatayan ni Law-ce a siwmian. . mala bunsan ci Law-cean sa老子化胡說 idaw ku sananay caay henay ka patay ci Law-ce sa, katukuh i Si-yi, pasakamuen ku Si-yi a tademaw, uyni u kamusa " Law-ce-hua-hu". Law-ce-hua-hu inakamu namaka Tun-han, han-hen-ti-yen-si siwa mihcaan " caylimlim mihcaan" ida i cuda nu sing-cea " idaw ku sananay ci Law-cean tayda i Yi-di malabunsan" a sasakamuen. "的說法. daw-ciw atu tay-sang-law-cun道教和太上老君 daw-ciw taneng talaayaw taydan nu sumamad nu syakay Cuo-kuo tademaw a kawawan, nikudan haymawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, hun-law-daw nu dadatengan, sisa, ci Law-ce u daw-cu han nu tademaw. sa u daw-ciw nu disi saan, ci Law-ce u tay-cen nu di'tuan. An-hua-wo-yen a Law-ce nakamuan itida i Wo-yen dadaydaysa, u kamu sa ku dadaydayan, bangcal ku kamu, idaw ku talakaway a nikinkiwan nu'puc a cudadan, malatusa kina kawaw, sayaway namakawawa katukuh tu balaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakay ci Law-ce atu ten-cin-kun a nakamuan. ina Wo-yen ten-cin-kun tataydaan midang atu Kan-aw a binacadan mapulung mihedek a masanga. mahiniay a Law-ce anunamakapina tu nu malebut a mihcaan nu kakakunkuan atu nidaydayan nu kakungkuan, matineng ku paylumaluma' ay nu tademawan, malenec tu a mitengil. . Law-cun-yun ba'tu老君岩 itida i Ci-iun buyu idaw ku mahida u tademaw a tabakiay nu ba'tuan mahida nipituktukan a cun-ciw zitay midatengay nu lumaan ci Law-ce a sasing, pangangan han Law-cun-yun ba'tu. Law-cun-yun ba'tu patideng i Sung-yun a zitayan, u Cung-kuo ayda satabakiay a Sun-tay daw-ciw a ba'tu nu sasingan, u Cin-yun buyu tataydaan midang, bangcal ku nituktukan, malalikisi atu nalimaan a epucan.
S.PHON: == r~ɾaw-ʦə** == nikaudipan** ʦaaj ka tinəŋi ku nijaduʔ~ʡ**** ʦaaj ka tinəŋ ku pir~ɾəʦuħan ni r~ɾaw-ʦə, i ʦudad inaiʔ~ʡ ku katinəŋan nu pir~ɾəʦuħan ni r~ɾaw-ʦə, ujdasa ni sə-ma-ʦin a ni sur~ɾitan, ʦu u sumamadaj a ʦu-kuo, ku-sin ajdaaj nu r~ɾu-ji-sin, r~ɾi-nijaduʔ~ʡ u sin-ʦən-tun a taj-ʦin-kun nijaduʔ~ʡ, ʦəi-zə-r~ɾi ajdaaj nu ʦin-ʦən-ħu kitidaan - taj-ʦin-kun-ʦən. ** r~ɾaw-ʦə" nu ajawan r~ɾinpiʦ ʦaj miħʦaan- nu ajawan sippiʦ ʦaj miħʦaan", pir~ɾəʦuħan i tun-ʦuo a ʦu-kuo ku-sin r~ɾi-sən-ʦəu-zəi-r~ɾi. ʦun-ʦən-ʦiw sə-siŋ-ʦia, muənəŋ i sjə-taj-kun-jən-san. ***(**********), . par~ɾitaən ni kun-ʦə **** nikudan kainaiʔ~ʡ ən tu nu tun-ʦuo wan-sə, tatəŋan idaw kina ʦi ʦuo-tin-ʦə, ʦir~ɾaw ku jadaħaj nu nijaduʔ~ʡan, maŋar~ɾaj namin mar~ɾataħudan, ʦi r~ɾi-pən-r~ɾə-ħaj matur~ɾin tu tusa a r~ɾasubu nu pina a miħʦaan. ʦi ʦuo-siŋ-wan sabaw tu pitu miħʦaan, sikawaw tu " ʦə-taj-ʦə-r~ɾun", baħbaħan patajda i sawaʦan, ħatidaaj tu nu ʦudadan maar~ɾaw patajda i ʦu-kuo a kuo-du, ar~ɾəs ħan ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə. samuħmuħ satu ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə, mar~ɾar~ɾaʦar~ɾ sa aʦi kun-ʦə. . r~ɾaw-ʦə** saan, tawja mar~ɾa sakakaaj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə ʦaaj kar~ɾəsəm makaadiħ tu ʦuo-ʦaw madəməʦ, tawja miʦur~ɾimək namakajda i ku-kun a taħəkar~ɾ nu ajawan, tawja maadiħ tu sakakaaj ʦi " kuŋ-r~ɾin", katajni par~ɾabaŋ ħan, maŋar~ɾaj papisakamu ʦi ʦuo-r~ɾian. idawja ʦi r~ɾi-zan sakamusa, tuʦi ji-si-taw, " idaw ku ʦudad ni r~ɾaw-ʦə tu " taw-də-ʦin", mar~ɾatusa, pabaaj a ʦudad u "taw-də", tada i ħəkar~ɾ ku kamu, pasu nikasumad nu ʦanʦanan, par~ɾutatəŋan ku diʔ~ʡdiʔ~ʡtusa, sasaaj nu ʦudadan u " də-ʦin" sakaj tadəmaw kujda, ħiʦan taajaw tadikud a kamuan, kja matənəns ku ħiʦan misuajaw tu tadəmaw sa. ʦaaj ka ħədək ku nipinanaman, maŋər~ɾuʔ~ʡ minanam, sadikudaj idaw ku r~ɾaħəʦi." ujni sat uku r~ɾiwan, kaʦaw satu katar~ɾan mur~ɾar~ɾiw. **, . tina kuŋkuan, ʦi ji-si i pasajda i r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ sakamusa, maadiħ ku war~ɾian sar~ɾuŋan ku dəmiad, takər~ɾar~ɾ sa, maħiʦaaj kija ku dəmiad, tanunamuħ sa, tabaki ku ŋiħa " namaka war~ɾian ku kapaħ nu dəmiad, idaw ku ʦaajaj kar~ɾəʦad nu tadəmaw makajda". katuud ku tadəmaw naiʔ~ʡ ku r~ɾawad miasik, miħar~ɾħar~ɾ tu nikatajni nu tadəmaw, i ku-kun nu panapananan ni sur~ɾitan tu ħudi saan " ʦə-ʦi-tun-r~ɾaj" səpat kina tabakiaj ni sur~ɾitan, katukuħ ajda, sisa sumamad u " ʦə-ʦi-tun-r~ɾaj-ħan-ku-kan, r~ɾima a mar~ɾəbut ku ʦud ani r~ɾaw-ʦə". ". udip a nidatəŋan **** ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə u mir~ɾiŋatuaj misur~ɾit tu taw-ʦia a tadəmaw, sakaudip pakunida sananaj, kasikadan ku kamu, ħatədəp ħan, aʦaaj kaʦaʦinr~ɾaw atu taw. sakaj ʦən-ʦə ħamin ħan pasu adidiaj nu tadəmawan a mikuwan, idaw ku ʦaʦajaj nu kamu ni r~ɾaw-ʦə, " matinəŋ ku pabawaj, anu idaw ku r~ɾaʔ~ʡʦusaj ħida ħantu, anu maħiʦa ku kamu nu taw, ħidan tu sa.", anu maŋar~ɾaj ku binawr~ɾan, sajadaħən ku nipadawsu sa, anu mapataj ku binawr~ɾan, mijukiw kita tu siidaaj nu tadəmaw, ʦaaj ka pataj ku binawr~ɾa, ujʦa ka tar~ɾawan mapataj sa." ." kapatajan** r~ɾaw-ʦə ħədək nu miħʦaan itida i di-taw-ħu mapataj. nikapatajan ni r~ɾaw-ʦə a siwmian. . mar~ɾa bunsan ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦəan sa***** idaw ku sananaj ʦaaj ħənaj ka pataj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə sa, katukuħ i si-ji, pasakamuən ku si-ji a tadəmaw, ujni u kamusa " r~ɾaw-ʦə-ħua-ħu". r~ɾaw-ʦə-ħua-ħu inakamu namaka tun-ħan, ħan-ħən-ti-jən-si siwa miħʦaan " ʦajr~ɾimr~ɾim miħʦaan" ida i ʦuda nu siŋ-ʦəa " idaw ku sananaj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦəan tajda i ji-di mar~ɾabunsan" a sasakamuən. "***. daw-ʦiw atu taj-saŋ-r~ɾaw-ʦun******* daw-ʦiw tanəŋ tar~ɾaajaw tajdan nu sumamad nu sjakaj ʦuo-kuo tadəmaw a kawawan, nikudan ħajmawsa idaw tu ku sin-daw, ħun-r~ɾaw-daw nu dadatəŋan, sisa, ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə u daw-ʦu ħan nu tadəmaw. sa u daw-ʦiw nu disi saan, ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə u taj-ʦən nu diʔ~ʡtuan. an-ħua-wo-jən a r~ɾaw-ʦə nakamuan itida i wo-jən dadajdajsa, u kamu sa ku dadajdajan, baŋʦar~ɾ ku kamu, idaw ku tar~ɾakawaj a nikinkiwan nuʔ~ʡpuʦ a ʦudadan, mar~ɾatusa kina kawaw, sajawaj namakawawa katukuħ tu bar~ɾaki a nikaudipan, sakatusa sakaj ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə atu tən-ʦin-kun a nakamuan. ina wo-jən tən-ʦin-kun tatajdaan midaŋ atu kan-aw a binaʦadan mapur~ɾuŋ miħədək a masaŋa. maħiniaj a r~ɾaw-ʦə anunamakapina tu nu mar~ɾəbut a miħʦaan nu kakakunkuan atu nidajdajan nu kakuŋkuan, matinəŋ ku pajr~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ aj nu tadəmawan, mar~ɾənəʦ tu a mitəŋir~ɾ. . r~ɾaw-ʦun-jun baʔ~ʡtu*** itida i ʦi-iun buju idaw ku maħida u tadəmaw a tabakiaj nu baʔ~ʡtuan maħida nipituktukan a ʦun-ʦiw zitaj midatəŋaj nu r~ɾumaan ʦi r~ɾaw-ʦə a sasiŋ, paŋaŋan ħan r~ɾaw-ʦun-jun baʔ~ʡtu. r~ɾaw-ʦun-jun baʔ~ʡtu patidəŋ i suŋ-jun a zitajan, u ʦuŋ-kuo ajda satabakiaj a sun-taj daw-ʦiw a baʔ~ʡtu nu sasiŋan, u ʦin-jun buju tatajdaan midaŋ, baŋʦar~ɾ ku nituktukan, mar~ɾar~ɾikisi atu nar~ɾimaan a əpuʦan.
